# AI Support Copilot

> Production-style AI support assistant with structured prompts, retry logic, and 8-dimension response evaluation.

This project demonstrates how to build reliable AI-powered features that go beyond a simple API call. It includes prompt engineering with system/user role separation, automatic retry with exponential backoff for rate limits, and a response evaluation system that catches hallucinations, irrelevant answers, error leaks, and low-quality outputs before they reach end users.

## Documentation

- [Introduction](https://someshchawan.github.io/ai-support-copilot-docs/docs/): Project overview and architecture
- [Quickstart](https://someshchawan.github.io/ai-support-copilot-docs/docs/quickstart): Get running in 5 minutes
- [Prompt Design](https://someshchawan.github.io/ai-support-copilot-docs/docs/concepts/prompts): How prompts are structured
- [Evaluation System](https://someshchawan.github.io/ai-support-copilot-docs/docs/concepts/evaluation): 8 quality checks explained
- [Retry Logic](https://someshchawan.github.io/ai-support-copilot-docs/docs/concepts/retry-logic): Error handling and backoff
- [Build a Chatbot](https://someshchawan.github.io/ai-support-copilot-docs/docs/guides/build-chatbot): Step-by-step implementation
- [Running Evaluations](https://someshchawan.github.io/ai-support-copilot-docs/docs/guides/running-evaluations): Using the evaluation system
- [API Reference](https://someshchawan.github.io/ai-support-copilot-docs/docs/reference/api-reference): Class and method documentation
- [Evaluation Checks](https://someshchawan.github.io/ai-support-copilot-docs/docs/reference/evaluation-checks): Every check detailed
- [Troubleshooting](https://someshchawan.github.io/ai-support-copilot-docs/docs/troubleshooting/api-errors): Common issues and fixes

## Source Code

- Repository: https://github.com/Someshchawan/ai-support-copilot
